prose:
Frontier-orbital analysis of furan

Method provenance
• Property: frontier-orbital (HOMO, LUMO) energies and HOMO–LUMO gap, in eV.
• Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier “standard”) with RI/RI-JK density fitting, via PySCF.
• Geometry provenance: user-supplied Cartesian file /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz; single-point calculation (no further optimisation) → notation DFT//input-XYZ.
• Environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent).
• Charge 0; multiplicity 1 (closed-shell RKS).
• Software: PySCF (through chemkit ‘frontier-orbitals’ skill).
• Convergence: SCF converged in 9 cycles; chemkit reported no warnings.
• Live .out log was streamed during the run; see the path given in the CLI invocation within the result JSON for reproduction.

Key numerical results (gas phase)
HOMO energy  = −6.3597638 eV
LUMO energy  = −0.1024036 eV
HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.2573602 eV (headline value)

Warnings: none reported.

This is a computed result (no experimental data).
